nodes.label: AI as communication tone adjuster
nodes.label_negative: Direct personal communication without tone adjustment
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to create a message that sounds more human than I do

nodes.label: AI as creative brainstorming partner for activities
nodes.label_negative: Relying solely on own ideas for activities

nodes.label_negative: Handling tricky situations without AI assistance
nodes.grounding_span: I turn to AI if there's some sort of tricky situation

nodes.label: AI as advice resource for student needs
nodes.grounding_span: I turn to AI when I need advice

nodes.label: AI as future autonomous tool requiring less supervision
nodes.label_negative: AI as current tool requiring effort and supervision
nodes.grounding_span: AI will continue to be more of a tool, rather than an autonomous actor

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment in manual tasks (e.g., Desmos graphs)
nodes.grounding_span: I make a lot of graphs on Desmos. I enjoy it

nodes.label: Effective communication with parents
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to sound rude

nodes.label: Engaging student learning
nodes.grounding_span: kept her interest for an hour

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced effort
nodes.grounding_span: it will require less effort and supervision

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI-assisted activity creation
nodes.grounding_span: the most satisfied is with some of the projects that I've come up with

nodes.label: Acceptance of AI taking over job roles
nodes.grounding_span: AI will take over all my jobs

nodes.label: Optimism about future seamless AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: the AI would know what tone I prefer

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: we went back and forth and came up with a game

nodes.label: Preference for keeping enjoyable tasks manual
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy it, and incorporating AI would be probably more trouble than its worth
